constructor.signature: PDBFixer(filename=None, pdbfile=None, pdbxfile=None, url=None, pdbid=None, platform=None)
constructor.note: Provide exactly one of filename/pdbfile/pdbxfile/url/pdbid. filename/url auto-detect PDB vs PDBx/mmCIF.

methods.name: addHydrogensToLigands
methods.doc: Add hydrogen atoms to ligand/heterogen residues using RDKit.

methods.name: addMembrane
methods.signature: addMembrane(lipidType='POPC', membraneCenterZ=0 nm, minimumPadding=1 nm, positiveIon='Na+', negativeIon='Cl-', ionicStrength=0 M)
methods.doc: Add a lipid membrane to the structure.

methods.name: addMissingAtoms
methods.doc: Add all missing heavy atoms, as specified by the missingAtoms, missingTerminals, and missingResidues fields.

methods.name: addMissingHydrogens
methods.doc: Add missing hydrogen atoms to the structure.

methods.name: addSolvent
methods.signature: addSolvent(boxSize=None, padding=None, boxVectors=None, positiveIon='Na+', negativeIon='Cl-', ionicStrength=0 M, boxShape='cube', forceField=None)
methods.doc: Add a solvent box surrounding the structure.

methods.name: applyMutations
methods.doc: Apply a list of amino acid substitutions to make a mutant protein.

methods.name: atomicOPT
methods.doc: Optimize the geometry by energy-minimizing the protein with an AMBER force field.

methods.name: downloadTemplate
methods.doc: Attempt to download a residue definition from the PDB and register a template for it.

methods.name: findMissingAtoms
methods.doc: Find heavy atoms that are missing from the structure.

methods.name: findMissingResidues
methods.doc: Find residues that are missing from the structure.

methods.name: findNonstandardResidues
methods.doc: Identify non-standard residues found in the structure, and select standard residues to replace them with.

methods.name: registerTemplate
methods.doc: Register a template for a nonstandard residue.  This allows PDBFixer to add missing residues of this type,

methods.name: removeChains
methods.doc: Remove a set of chains from the structure.

methods.name: removeHeterogens
methods.doc: Remove heterogens (non-polymer residues) from the structure.

methods.name: replaceNonstandardResidues
methods.doc: Replace every residue listed in the nonstandardResidues field with the specified standard residue.

notes.addMissingHydrogens: Hydrogenates protein residues and chain caps (ACE/NME/NH2/NMA/FOR). Ligands are left untouched.
notes.addHydrogensToLigands: templates = {residueName: SMILES_string_or_RDKit_Mol}. Only named ligands are hydrogenated; heavy-atom positions are never changed; fully offline (no CCD/network); returns {residueName: numHydrogensAdded}. Requires rdkit (lazy import).
